resources.string: I am aware of the above statement and I wish to trade high risk investment products
Account info was copied to clipboard

"The application may feature brokerage companies which may not be regulated in your country. Exercise caution and responsibility before opening an account with any brokerage company.
Contact details are provided for each company. Use them to further research their regulatory status and services. MetaQuotes may not possess complete and updated information about the regulation status of brokerage companies in particular countries and does not guarantee their reliability or reputation."
Use search to find a broker
All available symbols are already added to Quotes
Failed to open a demo account automatically. Enter your broker name and try again manually.
Ask your broker to contact MetaQuotes Ltd and we will add this company into the list shortly.
An anonymous account will be automatically created for you
Servers are still loading, an account will be automatically created after completion
MetaQuotes is a software development company that only provides demo accounts for testing purposes.
To report a problem to the broker, you need to have a trading account with it
Report a problem to the broker
Can`t allocate demo account. Server unreachable.
To resize and move indicator sub-windows, long tap on the chart
The \"Show period separators\" option draws additional vertical lines in the chart that correspond with the larger period (timeframe) borders.
Displays a pop-up window near the crosshair. This window shows indicator values on the specified bar.
Displays open, high, low and close prices on chart for the last candle or for candle pointed with crosshair.
Enable this option to display volumes on charts
Enable trade levels to see the prices of pending orders and the values of SL and TP on the chart.
The user %1$s has disabled incoming messages
You are temporary banned for suspicious activity
Are you sure you want to block %1$s?
You cannot add %1$s to this channel
Do you really want to delete all messages from %1$s?
Do you really want to delete channel %1$s?
Do you really want to delete chat %1$s?
You cannot add %1$s to this chat
You have been invited to chat %1$s
"You cannot delete the chat '%1$s', as you are its sole admin. Please assign another admin or close the chat."
This link name is already in use, please set another one
Can only contain letters, digits and underscores. Must start with a letter and be at least 5 characters long
An error occurred, please try again later
Not all users were added to chat
Are you sure you want to unblock %1$s?
Do you really want to unsubscribe from %1$s?
Unable to upload file, size is too big
Login to existing account or open demo account
Choose the most appropriate Trading Server
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Your complaint has been successfully sent!
Describe your problem in detail here
I agree to the processing of my personal data by MetaQuotes Ltd for request handling purposes.
MetaQuotes Ltd is a software development company and does not provide any financial, investment, brokerage or trading services.

"Technical problems with your trading account can only be resolved by your broker. This includes inability to connect or trade, any questions related to trading operations or financial state of the account, etc.
In this case you should contact your broker directly."
Unfortunately, we cannot help with questions related to demo account operation. If you have a problem, please open a new demo account.
Your message has been sent. We will send our reply to the specified email.
Please have a look at our {Privacy Policy}
Do you really want to delete account %1$d?
Unfortunately your device is not supported.
No news marked as Favorite. You can add news to Favorites when viewing.
Active Google account is required to enable this function
Failed to register messages receiving service. Check your Internet connection and try again.
Unfortunately, your phone does not support this function
By opening an account, you agree to the account opening terms and to the data protection policy of %1$s.
To trade using real money, you need to apply for a real trading account by entering into a separate agreement with a financial services company.
MetaQuotes is a software development company and does not provide investment or brokerage services.

In accordance with applicable laws and regulations, to operate, analyze or provide services through the application, we are required to request your consent for data collection, including access to personal information (Name, Email address, and Phone number), App info and performance (Crash logs), phone status and its identifiers (Device ID, Android ID) and other types of data as listed in the Privacy Policy.

We will collect the necessary information only after you provide us with your consent, and such consent will not be used to access any information for purposes unrelated to this.

We do not share your personal information with third parties. We are committed to strictly protecting the security of your personal information.

By pressing the ACCEPT button you acknowledge and agree with the terms and conditions of the EULA and the Privacy Policy, including consent to data collection as described.
Fill all fields to open a demo account
Use search to find a company
MetaQuotes ID was copied to clipboard
Cannot add more than %1$d indicators to chart window
Connection closed due to invalid server name. Contact your broker

"Describe the problem in the most detailed way, use at least %1$d characters.
The description will be sent to the Support mailbox together with the information about your device. Attach a screenshot to your email if necessary."
Use your login/password to connect to the broker of your choice
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
[Register] MQL5 account to communicate with other traders
Chat with your MQL5.community friends and fellow traders straight from the mobile platform.

"The MQL5.com account enables access to platform services: trading app purchases, VPS, signals, and communications via chat or forum.
Are you sure you want to delete your MQL5.com account? This will permanently remove all data, while you will also lose access to services. This action cannot be undone."
Your account cannot be deleted from here. Please create a Service Desk ticket in your profile at www.mql5.com
Temporary and unreliable emails are not allowed
Please choose a login to finish the registration
Authorize and chat with traders right here and now
Latin characters and digits without spaces
If you have an account, please [link]login[/link]
"If you don't have an account, please [link]register[/link]"
Visit mql5.com to access all community services.
You already have an MQL5 account, please use it to log in
password will be emailed to you
Your MQL5.community account has been successfully created. An automatically generated password has been sent to the specified email.
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Name must be at least %d characters long

"MetaQuotes ID is used to receive notifications from MetaQuotes services to your MetaTrader 5 mobile terminal. They are delivered instantly, never get lost on their way and come directly to the mobile terminal installed on your device."
Market Watch has no symbols available for trading.
Cannot add more than %1$d objects to chart window
Graphical objects are created on all symbols charts and all timeframes
Graphical objects are created only on current symbol chart and selected timeframes
Unfortunately, your application is not supported. Please update it to the latest version or contact the broker.
Follow financial news, study technical and fundamental analysis, and communicate with your fellow traders
Subscribe to trading news channels and follow the latest world events
Read daily hints, enhance your skills and achieve greater results
Share your experience, explore new ideas and find efficient solutions
Choose a broker and register an account to learn trading and test your strategies
To open a real account, please contact your broker
Order info was copied to clipboard
"One-time password generator will be bound to %1$d - '%2$s' trading account"
"One-time password generator has been bound to '%1$d'"
"This code protects the generator from unauthorized access"
Now to connect to your trading account via desktop terminal or any other mobile device, you need to enter one-time password from the OTP section.
"Enter this code when logging in to the bound trading accounts"
For security reasons, this trading account must be bound to the one-time password generator.
Please connect to your trading account via mobile app on smartphone in order to bind to the one-time password generator.
Binding of one-time password generator failed
"One-time password generator will be unbound from %1$d - '%2$s' trading account"
"One-time password generator has been unbound from '%1$d'"
Password must be complex enough, at least five symbols long and at least two of the three character types present - lowercase, uppercase, digits
Use this ID to send messages to this device via notify service.
Tell us what do you not like
Do you want to leave feedback?
Do you really want to delete all news?
Repeat action if you want to exit
Expiration for pending orders is disabled
Modification failed due to order or position being close to market
Order is being processed by the server
Order has been placed in queue…
Attention! The trade will be executed at market conditions, difference with requested price may be significant!
In the Request Execution mode, price must be requested from a broker before executing a trade operation.
Do you accept these new quotes?
Secret key for one-time password is required

"We wish to inform you that by using this trading platform further you will have access to leveraged high risk investment products, provided by the financial institution of your choice. Investing in such products might not be suitable for all investors, because it carries a risk of losing a part or all deposited amount.
Before deciding to trade high risk investment products you should carefully consider your investment objectives, level of experience and acceptable risk. The possibility exists that you could sustain a loss higher than your initial investment and therefore you should not invest money that you cannot afford to lose.
We invite you to widen your knowledge about all the risk factors that are concerned with investing in these products, and seek advice from a professional financial advisor if you have any doubts."

"Application requires SD memory card for operation.
If your mobile device is connected to PC in storage mode, please turn it off before launching the application."
"Tap on a symbol to add it to the list of selected ones"
Drag a symbol to change the display order
Stop Loss or Take Profit you set must differ from market price by at least %1$d points. Stops processing is performed on the broker side.
Your broker %1$s has changed their server name. The account is temporarily connected to the old address. To continue working, re-add the account with the correct server.
Add necessary symbols and tap Done
The server you are trying to connect to is unavailable. Please contact your broker.

"New version of MetaTrader 4 available.
Timely terminal updates increase its performance, reliability and convenience. "
In the advanced mode, the quotes window contains spreads, time data, as well as High and Low prices.
Cannot add more than %1$d windows to chart
